title: Nursery Rhyme. DXLI. Natural History.
content:
Shoe the colt,
                Shoe the colt,
        Shoe the wild mare,
                Here a nail,
                There a nail,
        Yet she goes bare.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXLI. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
